bohca-ravioli-recipe-lezzet.name: Ravioli Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of scaling interior you can prepare a lighter mantı using chicken meat or fine snacks meat.
I&ccedil adding fine chopped parsley or paprika as optional; you can enrich the flavor of harc.
Those who do not want to add yogurt sauce beans can also be used in plain yogurt or sulfur yogurt.
Instead of butter sauce, you can choose a lighter sauce prepared with olive oil and pepper.
You can add a different flavor for a few to the dough; drop olive oil.
You can use dry mint, water or red powder pepper instead of antep peanut of for the moment.

instructions: 1. Take the flour into a wide kneading container.
2. Urinary a mustache by adding eggs, salt and warm water to the car.
3. Aftertiring the dough for about 10 minutes, cover your list to 15 minutes.
4. Internal mix the mint, grated onion, salt and pepper in a container.
5. Open order to be thin in the unscrated dough.
6. Then cut the dough into small squares.
7. Poured rice from the middle of each square dough; from the small amount of put.
8. Cover the dough in the form of bohça by combining four mole to the middle.
9. Take the prepared sleeves in boiling salted water and sprinkle about 10–12 minutes.
10. Take the pizzeria suwith the service plate.

12. In a pan melt the butter and add pepper and dry mint.
12. August Visit and serve your ready-made sosu manges &uuml.

raspberry-balsamic-vinaigrette-dressing.name: Raspberry Balsamic Vinaigrette Dressing
instructions: Add Dijon mustard, raspberries, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, balsamic vinegar, and olive oil into a mason jar and secure lid tightly.
Shake vigorously until ingredients are mixed thoroughly.
Store dressing in the fridge and use within 1-2 weeks. You may need to shake up the ingredients again before each use.
Enjoy!

ratatouille-salad.name: Ratatouille Salad
instructions: Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the eggplant, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and softened, 5–10 minutes. Remove from the pan and drain on paper towels.
Add another drizzle of oil to the same pan, then add the red and yellow bell peppers. Cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, 2–3 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook, stirring, until the onions are soft and golden, about 3 minutes. Remove the peppers and onions from the pan.
Add the yellow squash and zucchini, season with salt and pepper, and cook squash have cooked down a bit, about 5 minutes.

Add the thyme and tomatoes, season with more salt, then add the lemon juice. Increase the heat to high and cook until mixture is sizzling. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the tomatoes start to release their juices, about 2 minutes.
Return the sautéed eggplant and peppers to the pan and stir to combine, then remove the pan from the heat.
Add the quinoa and water to a separate large skillet and stir to combine. Bring to a boil, then cover and reduce the heat to low. Simmer until the liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Spoon the vegetables over quinoa and sprinkle the basil on top. Serve warm.
Enjoy!

ravani-traditional-naxos-argiro.name: Ravani Traditional Naxos
instructions: In a small pot, add the sugar, water and lemon. Mix lightly.
Once it starts boiling, lower the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and add 2 tablespoons of Naxos butter.
Mix well until the butter melts and is incorporated into the syrup.
Allow the butter syrup to cool completely before using it.

really-cranberry-orange-yummy-gummy-pudd.name: Really Cranberry Orange Yummy Gummy Pudding Cake

ingredients.prep: rinsed and stems removed if necessary

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 10x14-inch baking pan.

Whisk together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and dried orange peel in a bowl. In a separate bowl, whisk together the orange juice concentrate, water, and orange extract. Using a pastry cutter, cut the butter into the flour mixture until well combined, and stir the orange juice mixture in, stirring just enough to thoroughly mix. Gently stir in the cranberries and pecans. Smooth the batter into the prepared baking dish.

Bake in the preheated oven until the top is browned, about 50 minutes. Reduce heat to 163°C (165 degrees C), cover the dish with foil, and bake until a knife inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 20 to 30 more minutes.

recipe-for-a-creamy-dulce-de-leche-mouss.name: Recipe For A Creamy Dulce De Leche Mousse
recipe-for-a-creamy-dulce-de-leche-mouss.original_name: Receta de un cremoso mousse de dulce de leche
instructions: Bate the egg awnings to the pits.
It incorporates sugar into the clear until dissolved.
Take the mixture to a bigger and bat with the help of the mixer until it doubles and gets super firm.
In another bowl, slightly beat up the cream to be pitted up and then add the milk sweet and mix with wrapped movements.
It incorporates meringue into milk sweet mixture and combines them into wrapped movements.
Pass the mousse to a refractory, a mold or wherever you want to do it, cover with film paper and let it stand in the refrigerator till it tightens.
When ready, decorate with milk and cream and cocoa powder.

recipe-for-pupusas-with-beans-comedera.name: Recipe For Pupusas With Beans

ingredients.item: 2 and ½ cups of tibia water

instructions: Inicia tu receta, cortando la cebolla y filetea el ajo.
Warm up a frying pan with a margarine bar, as the garlic and onion are padded. When transparent, add the beans and mix. Cooking for 7 minutes and let rest. Reserve.
Now, mix the salt with the corn flour into a bowl. Then you're gonna get warm water.
Mix with your hands and amasa very well till you get a very smooth and homogenous mass.
If you notice that it lacks water, you can add a little more but it should be rather compact.
Una vez tengas tu masa, divide en bolitas iguales. Humedece tus manos y ve formando las tortillas, aplastandolas poco a poco.
When you have your omelette, add some beans and mozzarella cheese at the centre. Cover with another omelette above and press the edges to join.
Warm an iron or frying pan, grease and cook apes for 6 minutes from each side or till they are well golden.
Once ready, enjoy!

recipe-for-this-mango-petacon-for-summer.name: Recipe For This Mango Petacon For Summer
recipe-for-this-mango-petacon-for-summer.original_name: Receta de este Mango Petacon para el verano
instructions: If you have no pitcher at your place, place a pitcher or prepare a cocktail in a deep glass.
Fold with a fresh mango purée and a mezal or tequila. Mix very well so that these two ingredients merge.
It incorporates the blend for daisies, lemon juice, cointerau and simple syrup. It's good till everything's integrated.
Decorate the edge of the glass with sugar and tipple. Add ice to your taste.
Fold the cocktail, decorate with mango pieces and mint leaves.

red-velvet-cookies-with-cheese-frosting-.name: Red Velvet Cookies With Cheese Frosting
red-velvet-cookies-with-cheese-frosting-.original_name: Galletas Red Velvet con frosting de queso

ingredients.item: 1 cucharadita de colorante rojo en gel

instructions: We put butter in a large bowl and add the other ingredients. We mix everything up till it's integrated. With a spoon we get portions of the mixture that we put into a plate with sulfurized paper. With the help of a spatula or knife we extend it a little, we have to leave space between them as they expand a little. We get into the oven that should be preheated, at about 180 ° C about 12 minutes. We get and we get cold at a grid.

While the cookies get cold we're going to prepare the cream or frosting with which we'll fill them with. That's as simple as putting glass sugar and cream and butter at room temperature in a large bowl, we mix them with some rods. If you have been inconsistently mixed with them, put them in the refrigerator for a while.
We get a cookie and at the bottom we extend a cape with another cookie and we have our Red Velvet cookies ready filled with cheese fracking.

red-wine-reduction-dessert-sauce.name: Red Wine Reduction Dessert Sauce
instructions: Combine wine, sugar, vanilla extract, and cinnamon together in a saucepan; simmer over low heat, stirring occasionally, until sauce reduces, about 30 minutes.

republic-of-the-rio-grande-grilled-tuna-.name: Republic Of The Rio Grande Grilled Tuna And Grapefruit Supreme Salad
instructions: Peel and segment 2 grapefruits; set aside. Squeeze the juice from the other half grapefruit into a measuring cup; it should yield about 1/4 cup of juice.

To make the salad dressing, combine the grapefruit juice, vinegar, oil, garlic, salt, freshly ground black pepper to taste, and minced jalapeño in a medium bowl; mix well. Cover and refrigerate the salad dressing.

Place the tuna steaks in a shallow dish. Pour 1 tablespoon of dressing over each piece of tuna. Turn the tuna in the marinade to coat. Cover with plastic wrap, or place all of the tuna steaks and marinade in a plastic bag, and refrigerate for 1 hour.

Light the grill. Remove the tuna from the refrigerator and allow to come to room temperature. Grill for about 4 minutes per inch of thickness for rare, 6 minutes for medium or until done to taste, turning at least once.

To serve, toss the greens with the salad dressing in a mixing bowl. Divide the dressed greens among 4 plates. Top each with a grilled tuna steak, then sprinkle with freshly ground black pepper. Spread grapefruit supremes over the top of the salad. Garnish with the cilantro and red onion slices.

rhubarb-cheesecake.name: Rhubarb Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Combine 1 cup flour, 1/4 cup sugar and 1/2 cup butter in a medium bowl; mix until crumbly and pat into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.

Toss chopped rhubarb, 1/2 cup sugar, and 1 tablespoon flour together; pour onto crust and bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside. Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat cream cheese and 1/2 cup sugar together in a large bowl until creamy; beat in eggs one at a time. Pour mixture over hot rhubarb in the pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set, about 30 minutes. Cover with sour cream topping while still hot.
To make the sour cream topping: Combine 1 cup sour cream, 2 tablespoons sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a small bowl. Mix well and spread on top of cake.

rib-eye-steak-and-mushroom-risotto.name: Rib-eye Steak And Mushroom Risotto

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat a sous vide cooker to 56°C (56 degrees C) in a water bath, according to manufacturer's instructions.
Season steaks with salt and pepper and place in a vacuum-seal or heavy-duty freezer bag. Seal. Drop the bag into the water bath and set timer for 2 hours.
Remove steaks from bag and place on a paper towel-lined plate. Pat dry carefully on both sides.

Heat canola oil in a heavy skillet over medium-high heat until it starts smoking. Add steaks. Cook until nicely browned on both sides, flipping every 15 to 30 seconds, about 90 seconds total. Transfer steaks to a plate; let rest for 10 minutes. Slice thinly against the grain.

Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large, heavy saucepan over medium-high heat. Stir in white mushrooms and cremini mushrooms; cook until soft, about 3 minutes. Transfer mushrooms and their liquid to a bowl.

Heat the remaining tablespoon olive oil in the same saucepan over medium-low heat. Add shallots and garlic. Cook, stirring constantly, until shallots are tender, about 3 minutes. Add rice and increase heat to medium. Cook and stir until rice is pale golden with nearly translucent edges, 3 to 4 minutes.

Pour wine into the rice mixture; cook, stirring constantly, until fully absorbed, about 6 minutes. Add 1/2 cup chicken broth; stir until absorbed, about 3 minutes. Add remaining broth, 1/2 cup at a time, stirring risotto continuously until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender yet firm to the bite, 15 to 20 minutes more.
Remove risotto from heat. Stir in mushrooms with their liquid, butter, chives, sea salt, and freshly ground pepper. Plate the risotto with strips of steak on the side.

ricotta-dumplings-with-asparagus-and-gre.name: Ricotta Dumplings With Asparagus And Green Garlic

ingredients.item: Chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth

ingredients.prep: pale green and white parts, thinly sliced crosswise

instructions: Check the wetness of the ricotta before preparing dumplings. If the ricotta is sold in an individual drained basket, then all you need to do is pat dry and adjust the quantity to 1½ cups. For ricotta that’s not drained, you’ll need to press it to drain any excess liquid. Line a colander with cheesecloth and set inside a large bowl (to catch the liquid draining from the ricotta). Spoon ricotta onto cheesecloth and put a paper towel on top. Weigh ricotta down using cans or other heavy pantry items; chill for at least 4 hours and up to 24. The ricotta should be dry and crumbly. Measure out 1½ cups.

Pulse ricotta, Grana Padano, egg, egg yolk, and salt in a food processor just until smooth. Sprinkle flour over ricotta mixture and pulse again until just combined. Transfer dumpling batter to a medium bowl.

Dust a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet generously with flour. Using a metal spoon, scoop out 2–3 tsp. dumpling batter and scrape spoon against side of bowl at a 45° angle to smooth batter. Using your finger tip, push batter off spoon and let drop onto baking sheet (this may take a few tries). The dumpling will slightly curve at each ends. Dust tops with more flour. (You should have about 65 dumplings.)
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add asparagus and cook until almost tender, 2–3 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water; drain and pat dry. Reserve pot.
Meanwhile, bring chicken stock to a simmer in a large skillet over medium heat.

Return pot of water to a gentle simmer and add dumplings (one by one so they don’t crush each other), stirring occasionally, until they’re almost double in size and cooked through and tender, about 4 minutes (dumplings will quickly float to surface).

Transfer dumplings to pan; add butter and green garlic. Cook, tossing often, until sauce has thickened and garlic has slightly softened, about 3 minutes. Add asparagus, chives, and lemon juice and toss to warm asparagus; season with salt and pepper. Serve dumplings with more cheese and drizzle with olive oil.
Do Ahead: Dumplings can be formed 1 month ahead. Freeze on baking sheet, then transfer to resealable plastic bag once frozen. Cook from frozen about 6 minutes.

risotto-ai-funghi-porcini-in-pentola-a-p.name: Risotto Ai Funghi Porcini In Pentola A Pressione (porcini Mushroom Risotto)
instructions: Brush dirt off porcini mushrooms with a clean cloth or vegetable brush. Slice into bite-sized pieces.
Pour beef stock into a saucepan over low heat. Cover and keep warm.

Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Cook garlic until lightly golden, about 1 minute. Stir in mushrooms; cook until slightly softened, 2 to 3 minutes. Pour in 1/2 cup wine; cook until alcohol evaporates, 3 to 5 minutes. Continue cooking until mushrooms are tender but still firm, adding a little beef stock if they look dry, about 10 minutes.
Remove skillet from heat; sprinkle half the parsley over mushrooms. Season with salt. Cover and keep warm.

Heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil in a stovetop pressure cooker. Cook spring onion until softened, about 1 minute. Add Arborio rice; cook and stir until toasted and coated with oil, 2 to 3 minutes. Increase heat and pour in remaining 1/2 cup wine; simmer until alcohol has evaporated and rice has absorbed most of the wine, about 2 minutes.
Stir beef stock into the pressure cooker. Seal according to manufacturer's instructions. Increase heat to high; cook until cooker whistles, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low and cook for 4 minutes.

Remove cooker from heat and release pressure according to manufacturer's instructions. Remove the lid. Fold mushroom mixture, with 1 to 2 tablespoons cooking liquid, into the rice. Stir in Parmesan cheese and butter. Let stand for 2 to 3 minutes. Sprinkle remaining parsley on top.

roast-greek-lamb-with-tzatziki-roasted-v.name: Roast Greek Lamb With Tzatziki, Roasted Vegetables, And Greek Salad
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Open the 'pocket' on the wide end of the leg of lamb and stuff with some garlic slices, 1 rosemary sprig, 1 bay leaf, and salt. Make 3 long incisions on the top of the leg with your knife. Stuff remaining garlic, rosemary sprigs, bay leaves, and some salt into the cuts. Season well with salt all over.
Season eggplant, zucchini, and 1 red onion with salt and tumble into a roasting pan. Place the leg of lamb on top.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 149°C (150 degrees C) and cover pan with aluminum foil. Continue baking until lamb is tender, about 2 hours 30 minutes.

Spread potatoes on a baking sheet. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons olive oil and season with sea salt. Place in the bottom third of the oven. Bake lamb and potatoes for 30 minutes. Remove lamb and let rest while potatoes finish cooking, about 30 minutes more.
Combine grated cucumber, mint, oregano, and salt in a bowl. Mix in yogurt until well combined. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

Combine tomatoes, sliced cucumber, sliced red onion, and black olives in a deep-sided dish. Drizzle 3 tablespoons olive oil and red wine vinegar on top. Place feta on top and cover with dried oregano.
Carve lamb and serve on a big platter. Scoop out vegetables and juices from the roasting pan and add to the platter. Place roasted potatoes, tzatziki, and Greek salad nearby.

roast-kidney-recipe-lezzet.name: Roast Kidney Recipe

ingredients.item: You can add boiled potatoes, rice or bulgur.
You can make traditional Turkish presentation with turt and onion.
Taze baharatlar (maydanoz, dereotu) ile tabak dekorasyonu yapabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Tip cut to two, inner clean white oil vessels push.
2. Wait at least 1–2 hours of lemon or vinegar water to get blood and odor.
3. Then rinse with plenty of water and strain, ad chop.
4. Heat butter and liquid oil in a large pan.
5. Highlight add tenions and vegetables and pink.
6. In addition to strain böget the juice in the fire of the water in the fire, and roast until the water.
7. Add fine diluts and cube stones.
8. Taste salt, pepper and pepper.
9. Bake about 15–20 minutes in medium fire.
10. Serve hotly with lava, rice or buttery bulgur.
11. 11. 11. 11. Uryou can sprinkle fresh thyme or parsley.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

roast-pork-tenderloin-with-apricot-miso-.name: Roast Pork Tenderloin With Apricot-miso Glaze
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (218°C). Coat a large rimmed baking sheet with oil spray. Combine apricot preserves, red miso, Champagne vinegar, finely grated orange peel, and chopped garlic in a small pot over medium heat. Cook until thickened, 1 to 2 minutes. Reserve the glaze.

Sprinkle the pork tenderloins with salt and pepper. Place them on the prepared baking sheet, tucking the thin ends under to ensure even cooking. Brush the pork with 2 tablespoons of the apricot glaze; roast for 12 to 15 minutes. Turn the pork over with tongs and brush with 3 more tablespoons of glaze. Continue to roast until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the pork registers 66°C (66°C), 8 to 10 minutes longer.

Transfer the pork to a cutting board, tent with foil, and let rest for 10 minutes. Meanwhile, add the chicken broth to the remaining apricot glaze in the pot. Bring to a simmer and cook until the sauce is reduced to about 2/3 cup, approximately 5 minutes. Season the sauce with salt and pepper.
Slice the pork crosswise into 1/2- to 3/4-inch-thick slices and arrange on a platter. Spoon the prepared sauce over the sliced pork and serve immediately.

roasted-brussels-sprouts-with-pears.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts With Pears

ingredients.prep: cut into small pieces, or more to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Lightly grease a baking pan.
Combine Brussels sprouts and pears in a bowl with 2 tablespoons olive oil, diced onion, garlic powder, and salt. Spread into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned and tender, 25 to 30 minutes, tossing after 15 minutes to brown evenly.
While baking, place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels.

Drain bacon grease form the skillet and discard; add remaining olive oil and balsamic vinegar to the skillet. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture reduces slightly, 3 to 4 minutes. Pour over roasted mixture and serve.

roasted-carrots-and-chickpeas-with-herby.name: Roasted Carrots And Chickpeas With Herby Cashew Cream

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of water to a boil, then remove from heat. Add cashews and let sit until tender, 30–60 minutes.
Drain cashews and transfer to a blender (preferably high-speed) or food processor. Add garlic, oil, salt, and ½ cup water and purée until smooth.
Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool; finely chop. Reserve baking sheet.
Increase oven temperature to 425°. Purée cashew cream, scallions, dill, parsley, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, ⅛ tsp. pepper, and ¼ cup water in a blender until smooth. Set herby cashew cream aside.

Place carrots and chickpeas on reserved baking sheet. Drizzle 4 Tbsp. oil over and sprinkle cumin, paprika, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and remaining ⅛ tsp. pepper on top; toss to coat. Arrange in an even layer and roast 10 minutes. Remove carrots and chickpeas from oven and toss. Return to oven and roast until carrots are tender and mostly golden and chickpeas are crisp, 10–15 minutes.
Place salad greens in a large bowl; drizzle in remaining 1 Tbsp. lemon juice and 1 Tbsp. oil and season with remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Toss to coat.
Arrange greens on a platter, then spoon carrots and chickpeas on top. Drizzle with reserved herby cashew cream and top with almonds.

roasted-cauliflower-with-sesame-and-boni.name: Roasted Cauliflower With Sesame And Bonito

ingredients.item: Raw unhulled benne or sesame seeds
Cocoa butter or virgin coconut oil

instructions: Toast benne seeds in a large saucepan over medium heat, swirling pan constantly, until golden brown and fragrant, about 5 minutes. Set 2 tsp. benne seeds aside in a small bowl for serving. Add 4 cups water to remaining benne seeds and bring to a simmer. Cover pan and cook seeds until tender and beginning to pop, 1½–2 hours. Drain seeds and transfer to a blender. Add vegetable oil, sesame oil, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, and ¼ cup water and blend, adding more water as needed, until smooth, creamy, and the consistency of mayonnaise; season dressing with salt.

Preheat oven to 450°. Place cauliflower in a small skillet and drizzle with cocoa butter and olive oil; season with salt. Roast, basting every 10 minutes or so with oil, until deeply browned and crisp and cauliflower is beginning to collapse, 60–75 minutes. Remove from oven and drizzle with remaining 1 Tbsp. lemon juice; let cool.

Spoon about ⅓ cup dressing onto a large plate. Place cauliflower on top and sprinkle with bonito flakes and reserved benne seeds; season with more salt if desired. Serve with remaining dressing alongside.

roasted-chestnuts-in-air-fryer-pequerece.name: Roasted Chestnuts In Air Fryer
roasted-chestnuts-in-air-fryer-pequerece.original_name: Castañas asadas en freidora de aire
instructions: Wash the chestnuts under cold water and dry them well with a cloth.

With a sharp knife, make a cross-cut at every chestnut. Ideally using a saw knife, as with bread, that scattering less and allows more control. The cut should get through the shell but without getting too far inside the pulp.
Put them in a bowl, cover them with water and leave them to moist for at least half an hour so they can then be more easily peeled. Listen to them and dry them again.

It purifies air frying at 175 ° for about 4 minutes. Put the chestnuts in a basket in a single cape, with them unloaded and cook them for about 17- 18 minutes. In the middle of the cooking, move the basket a little to suit them evenly.
When ready, wrap them in a clear cloth and let them rest for about 5 to 10 minutes. That rest allows them to "sweat," which softens their inner skin and facilitates their skin.
While they are still hot and before peeling them, sprinkle some salt above: the moisture of rest helps them stick. Do them while they're still warm and serve them right away.

roasted-chicken-thighs-with-herb-butter-.name: Roasted Chicken Thighs With Herb Butter Recipe
roasted-chicken-thighs-with-herb-butter-.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo asado con mantequilla de hierbas
instructions: Retira parte de la piel de los muslos y hazles cortes laterales para que se cocinen mejor.
Sazona los muslos con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Engrasa una plancha y calienta.
A bowl adds butter and incorporates rosemary, thyme, parsley, oregano and garlic powder. It's a good mix till you form a dough.
Unta a los muslos de pollo con esta mantequilla de hierbas muy bien hasta que queden impregnados.
Asa los muslos de pollo a la plancha por 15 minutos de cada lado o hasta que queden doraditos y jugosos por dentro.
Once ready, enjoy!

roasted-garlic-chicken-bacon-pizza.name: Roasted Garlic Chicken & Bacon Pizza
instructions: Preheat the grill to 204°C (200°C).

Place the garlic heads on a small sheet of aluminum foil. Drizzle 1½ tablespoons of olive oil over the garlic and season with ½ teaspoon salt and ½ teaspoon pepper, then wrap tightly. Place the garlic on one side of the grill, close the lid, and roast for 35–40 minutes, until the cloves are tender and golden brown. Remove from the grill and let cool for 10 minutes, then unwrap the foil and squeeze the garlic cloves out of the skins.

Meanwhile, season the chicken breast and thigh with the remaining 1½ teaspoons of salt, remaining 1½ teaspoons black pepper, the paprika, Italian seasoning, and 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Add the seasoned chicken to the rotisserie basket and turn on the motor so that the chicken rotates and cooks evenly. Cook for 10–12 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C). Remove the chicken and let rest for about 5 minutes, then roughly chop.

Heat a small cast-iron skillet on the sizzle zone over medium-high heat. Add the bacon to the pan and cook, flipping occasionally, for 6–8 minutes, until very crispy and cooked through. Remove the bacon from the pan and roughly chop.

Roll out the pizza dough to your desired shape, about ½ inch thick. Brush the remaining ¼ cup of olive oil over both sides of the dough, then place directly on the grill grates (or use a pizza stone if preferred). Close the lid and cook for 5–6 minutes, or until the bottom is lightly browned.

Flip the dough over and top with the pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, cheddar cheese, chopped chicken, chopped bacon, and roasted garlic cloves. Close the lid and cook for another 5–6 minutes, or until the bottom of the dough is cooked through and the cheese has melted.
Remove the pizza from the grill and sprinkle with the parsley. Slice and serve immediately.
Enjoy!

roasted-nectarines-with-labneh-herbs-and.name: Roasted Nectarines With Labneh, Herbs, And Honey

ingredients.prep: or Greek yogurt strained in a cheesecloth bag overnight

ingredients.item: Generous handful of toasted flaked almonds
Heaped teaspoon pul biber chilli flakes

ingredients.prep: stacked, rolled up together and finely sliced widthways into thin ribbons

ingredients.item: Maldon sea salt flakes and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°. Line a large baking tray with baking paper.

Place the nectarine halves cut side up on the prepared tray, then drizzle each with a little olive oil and season generously with pepper. Bake for 25–30 minutes until the edges of the fruit are browned and the flesh is cooked through and tender. Remove from the oven and leave to cool.

Select a large platter and spread the labneh or strained Greek yogurt all over the surface, then arrange the roasted nectarines on top. Drizzle with a little olive oil, season with a little salt and sprinkle over the toasted flaked almonds, followed by the oregano and pul biber. Drizzle all over with the honey and, finally, scatter over the mint ribbons. Take to the table to serve.

roasted-pineapple-with-vanilla-ice-cream.name: Roasted Pineapple With Vanilla Ice Cream
roasted-pineapple-with-vanilla-ice-cream.original_name: Ananás assado com gelado de baunilha
instructions: Peel the pineapple and put it on a board. Water with brandy, lime juice and sprinkle with sugar. Take it in the oven, preheated to 200oC, for 30 to 35 minutes. Remove.
Cut the pineapple into slices, with the thickness of a finger, sprinkle with the lime scrapes and serve, still warm, with the ice cream balls.

roasted-vegetables-with-olive-oil-lezzet.name: Roasted Vegetables With Olive Oil

ingredients.item: Half tea glass leaking olive oil

instructions: 1. Wash the peppers, eggplants and pumpkins with plenty of water.
2. Cut the stem parts of the red peppers and clean their cores.
3. slice and get pepper rings.
4. Cut the zucchini into the longitudinal rör and cut back to the two.
5. Peel the peel of onions.
6. slice red onion in the form of apple slice.
7. Take olive oil into a large and deep pan.
8. Add peel garlic and roast for 2-3 minutes.
9. Add potatoes, red onion slices and barley onions and continue roasting.
10. Add peppers, pumpkins and eggplants.
11. 11. roast the water that leaves vegetables on the ground fire.
12. Continue cooking until vegetables are caramelized.
12. August Taste salt and pepper.
14 July Add containers and cook the pan from the stove.
15. Share the meal serving plates.
16. Serve hot or warm.
17.  Afiyet olsun.
18. See vegetable recipes for more.

roasted-whole-wheat-bulgur-pilaf-lezzet.name: Roasted Whole Wheat Bulgur Pilaf
instructions: 1. The flavor offers wonderful recipes for your tables.
2. Wash the water with plenty of water.
3. Roast the meat with butter in the saucepan.
4. Add red pepper and shake and cook for 1-2 minutes.
5.  Suyu ve tuzu ekleyin.
6. Cook the pan in jealous fire until you close the cover of the pot and pull the water into the water by adding the bull.
7. Serve hot for 20 minutes.

roman-sambal.name: Roman Sambal

ingredients.item: Red red fresno chiles or red jalapeños

instructions: Pulse chiles, garlic, and salt in a food processor to a fine paste. Transfer to a glass jar; cover with cheesecloth and secure with a rubber band. Let sit at room temperature at least 1 day and up to 2 days to ferment (read: develop flavor—the longer it sits, the better).

Transfer chile mixture to a blender; add lime juice, vinegar, and sugar and purée until smooth. Transfer to a clean jar, cover with cheesecloth, and let sit at room temperature at least 1 day and up to 2 days to ferment more. Chill until cold.
Sambal can be made 1 month ahead. Keep chilled.

royal-roselle-fizz.name: Royal Roselle Fizz
instructions:
Combine hibiscus flowers and bay leaves in a small bowl. Bring 5 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan and pour over hibiscus flowers and bay leaves to cover. Let sit 8 hours (overnight works well), then strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass or small bowl; discard solids. Cover and chill tea until cold, at least 1 hour.
Do ahead: Tea can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Bring raw sugar, bay leaves, and 2 cups water to a simmer in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Remove from heat and let cool.

Strain simple syrup through a fine-mesh sieve into a measuring glass or small bowl; discard bay leaves. Cover and chill until cold, at least 1 hour.
Do ahead: Simple syrup can be made 5 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Stir vermouth, lime juice, pickle brine, bitters, 2 oz. hibiscus tea, and ½ oz. simple syrup in a glass to combine. Add ice to fill and top off with sparkling wine. Garnish with bay leaves.
